name: Breach the server
description: Gain access before the trace completes.

name: Extract the asset
description: Escort the contact out under pressure.

name: Black-bag op
description: Quiet entry, quieter exit. Leave no optics, only absence.

name: Burn the safehouse
description: Thermite where the wiring diagrams sleep. Alibis are someone else's problem.

name: Ghost the principals
description: Be where the calendar says they aren't. Memorize faces, then forget them on purpose.

name: Intercept the courier
description: Hard-shell case, soft schedule. Take the package before the route updates.

name: Lift the lab sample
description: Cold chain, hot lights. One vial and you're already overexposed.

name: Riot cover story
description: Street noise buys minutes. Loyal crews hold the line while you walk out the side door.

name: Scrub deniability
description: Retcon the paper trail from orbit. No map pin—just permissions and panic.

name: Seize the ledger cold
description: One drive, many names. Snatch the physical proof before it goes warm.

name: Wedge the turncoat
description: Pressure on a roster asset until they cough coordinates. Personal, not public.

name: Weapons cache lift
description: Crates stamped agricultural. Count rounds, not questions.

name: Lean on the paymaster
description: Follow the slush. A quiet word where budgets bend.

name: Signals vanish
description: Kill the handshake, not the hardware. Let them argue with static.

name: Vault distraction
description: Front door chaos, back door inches. Luck is a schedule you rigged.

name: Containment breach play
description: Trip the alarm you wrote. Walk out while they rehearse the wrong disaster.

name: Motorcade shadow
description: Three cars, two decoys, one window. Bodywork is policy.

name: Shell company spike
description: Boardroom theater for auditors who never leave the building. Spike the narrative, not the stock—yet.

name: Dead-hand drop
description: If you don't check in, the packet walks itself to the press. Retrieve before the timer wins.

name: Honeytrap debrief
description: They talked too much over dinner. You need names while the charm still stings.

name: Perimeter cut
description: Fence, sensors, dogs—someone drew a line. You redraw it with wire cutters and patience.

name: Blueprint smuggle
description: Rolls too big for a briefcase, too hot for a courier app. Move the plans like contraband art.

name: Witness shaping
description: Memory is plastic. One friendly minion remembers the version we need on the stand.
